subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! I bear witness at this moment, as do all who circle round Thy Most Great Throne and the dwellers of the celestial concourse [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحانک اللهم یا الهی اشهد حینئذ و کل من یطوف فی حول عرشک الاعظم و سکان ملا
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for the departed, @soul; spirit after death
